name: Rabbit in Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the rabbit overnight in the refrigerator with salted water.
2. Before cooking, remove the rabbit pieces and drain them, patting dry.
3. Place the rabbit pieces, ham, onion, thyme, and mushrooms in a Crock-Pot.
4. Pour in the bouillon, moistening well.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours.
6. Before serving, turn the setting to High.
7. Combine the sour cream, lemon juice, and flour in a separate bowl.
8. Remove the rabbit pieces to a warm platter.
9. Stir the sour cream mixture into the Crock-Pot.
10. Cook until thickened.
11. Spoon the sauce over the rabbit and sprinkle with parsley.
Serves 6
